issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1398: remaining Python asset sweep 8/10

commands: find src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1398 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens regression coverage and refreshes validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Baseline HEAD before lane changes was `c8e9d79c`.
Commit `af7362cd` was rebased onto `origin/main` at `c71fe8ca`, producing lane HEAD `7590d279` before a second push rejection.
The two-commit lane stack was then rebased onto `origin/main` at `3db3516b`, producing lane HEAD `131a3877` with refreshed validation.
